scripts.test: pnpm run test:packages && pnpm run test:website && pnpm run test:website-dev && pnpm run test:railyard
scripts.check:packages: pnpm run typecheck:packages && pnpm run test:packages && pnpm run test:coverage:packages
scripts.check: pnpm run check:packages && pnpm run check:website && pnpm run check:website-dev && pnpm run check:railyard
scripts.lint: pnpm run --dir website lint:fix && pnpm run --dir website-dev lint:fix && pnpm run --dir railyard/frontend lint:fix
scripts.format: pnpm run --dir website format && pnpm run --dir website-dev format && pnpm run --dir railyard/frontend format
